headline: Verizon Has 24.9% Upside, and Here’s the Undeniable Force to Buy Before July 24
summary: Verizon's July 24 earnings report is shaping up as more than a routine quarterly update, and investors who understand what is quietly building beneath the surface may want to position before the open.

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on T-Mobile US, Lowers Price Target to $243
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Maher Yaghi   maintains T-Mobile US (NASDAQ:TMUS) with a Sector Outperform and lowers the price target from $263 to $243.

raw.headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on T-Mobile US, Lowers Price Target to $243

headline: Why T-Mobile US (TMUS) is One of the Top Cheap Blue Chip Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) is one of the top cheap blue chip stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. Barclays cut the price target on T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) to $230 from $245 on July 8 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The same day, Wells Fargo initiated coverage of the stock […]
